Blacksmith Stage._comment: We wouldn't expect the player to progress beyond 2-3 years without a renewable tool source, so this is a region to push Blacksmith early without explicitly placing the item early.

Growth Stage 1._comment: To grow beyond ~30 population or so you'll require at least 2 food sources and a way to access more logs (Forester or Bridge).
Growth Stage 1.requires: ((|@Trade Items - Crop Field:1| AND |Crop Field|) OR (|@Trade Items - Orchard:1| AND |Orchard|) OR (|@Trade Items - Livestock:1| AND |Pasture|) OR |@Starting Food Production:2|) AND (|Wooden Bridge| OR |Forester Lodge|) AND |Wood Cutter| AND |Blacksmith|

Growth Stage 2._comment: Every crucial item to stablize and grow your town. Reaching 50 population enters logic at this stage.
Growth Stage 2.requires: ((|@Trade Items - Crop Field:1| AND |Crop Field|) OR (|@Trade Items - Orchard:1| AND |Orchard|) OR (|@Trade Items - Livestock:1| AND |Pasture|) OR |@Starting Food Production:2|) AND |Forester Lodge| AND |Wood Cutter| AND |Blacksmith| AND |Wooden Bridge| AND |Storage Barn|

50 Pop._comment: Very similar to Growth Stage 2, but requires a third Starting Food building if the player only has two with no farming sources. Reaching population 100 enters logic at this stage.
50 Pop.requires: ((|@Trade Items - Crop Field:1| AND |Crop Field|) OR (|@Trade Items - Orchard:1| AND |Orchard|) OR (|@Trade Items - Livestock:1| AND |Pasture|) OR |@Starting Food Production:3|) AND |Forester Lodge| AND |Wood Cutter| AND |Blacksmith| AND |Wooden Bridge| AND |Storage Barn|

100 Pop._comment: To progress beyond 100 population the player will need a renewable source of tools: either Mine (for iron) or Trading Post (for tools) is required. Getting enough iron from the map starts to become a concern around 150-200.
100 Pop.requires: |@Progression Buildings:12| AND (|Mine| OR |Trading Post|) AND ((|@Trade Items - Crop Field:1| AND |Crop Field|) OR (|@Trade Items - Orchard:1| AND |Orchard|) OR (|@Trade Items - Livestock:1| AND |Pasture|) OR |@Starting Food Production:3|) AND |Forester Lodge| AND |Wood Cutter| AND |Blacksmith| AND |Wooden Bridge| AND |Storage Barn|

200 Pop._comment: Mostly exists to keep the 300 victory from going into logic at 100 population. At this point the player will have all but 6 Progression Buildings.
200 Pop.requires: |@Progression Buildings:15| AND (|Mine| OR |Trading Post|) AND ((|@Trade Items - Crop Field:1| AND |Crop Field|) OR (|@Trade Items - Orchard:1| AND |Orchard|) OR (|@Trade Items - Livestock:1| AND |Pasture|) OR |@Starting Food Production:3|) AND |Forester Lodge| AND |Wood Cutter| AND |Blacksmith| AND |Wooden Bridge| AND |Storage Barn|
